title: Floral Flaky Baguette Crumble
description: This sugar-free-friendly Filipino dish features a floral-flavored crumble made from baguette slices and other simple ingredients for an energizing breakfast or snack.

ingredients.name: 1 tsp vanilla extract
ingredients.notes: for added flavor and floral aroma

ingredients.name: 1/2 tsp ground cloves
ingredients.notes: optional, adds a hint of Christmas-like aroma

instructions: If using sugar for sweetness, mix it with the vanilla and cloves in a small bowl.
Place sliced baguettes on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper or silicone mat. Spread them lightly with the mixture if desired.
Bake for 8-10 minutes until golden brown.
Remove from oven and let cool slightly before serving. Optionally sprinkle some additional cloves or star anise for garnish.
